message:
chore: add ephemeral agent artifacts to .gitignore

Ignore .beads_recovery/, C*/D* version markers, db300_*.toml config
scratch files, and librust_out.rlib — agent-generated artifacts that
should not be tracked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -242,3 +242,10 @@ tmp_rch_probe/
 __CHANGESET__
 __PATCHSET__
 .codex-target-arc/
+
+# Ephemeral agent-generated scratch files at repo root
+.beads_recovery/
+/C[0-9]*
+/D[0-9]*
+db300_*.toml
+librust_out.rlib
